shows.name: Soul Proprietor
shows.desc: DJ Ratt🐀 Rockford continues our streak of early morning shows, this time with music and words to heal the soul, and get you through the week.

shows.name: Brick City Jungle
shows.desc: Playing the best of jungle music from the 90s to today. We also delving into drum and beats, breakcore, house, and electronic.

shows.name: Too Much Information
shows.desc: DJ Wikiediea lures an unsuspecting guest each week to learn about a bizarre, very niche topic in depth. Topics may include, but are not limited to: dinosaur feces, Disney-on-ice, wartime knitting, and Dolly Parton. College is supposed to be about learning, right?

A Couple of Loose Screws
